name: kdb-sqltools
description: SQLTools driver for kdb+/q using q IPC over TCP

scripts.test:e2e: npm run compile && npm run prepare:e2e-linux-libs && node test/e2e/run.js
scripts.test: npm run compile && node test/run.js && npm run prepare:e2e-linux-libs && node test/e2e/run.js

commands.title: Run q Script in SQLTools Results
Run q Script in kdb Panel
Run q Script in kdb Panel (Replace)
Run q Script in New kdb Panel
Run Selection in New kdb Panel

enumDescriptions: Use the lightweight kdb results panel.
kdb-sqltools.results.target.description: Result target used by the default kdb-sqltools q run commands.

enumDescriptions: Reuse the current or first kdb results panel.
Open a new kdb results panel for each default kdb-panel run.
kdb-sqltools.results.kdbPanel.defaultRun.description: Result-tab behavior used by the default kdb panel run commands. Explicit Replace and New commands ignore this setting.

enumDescriptions: Open the first kdb results panel in the active editor group.
Open the first kdb results panel beside the active editor group.
Open the first kdb results panel in editor group one.
Open the first kdb results panel in editor group two.
Open the first kdb results panel in editor group three.
kdb-sqltools.results.kdbPanel.initialVie.description: Initial editor group for a newly-created kdb results panel. VS Code does not expose an API for extensions to create a bottom split automatically.

kdb-sqltools.performance.trace.description: Log query performance timings to the extension host console.

kdb-sqltools.results.cellWidth.description: Legacy fallback cell width in pixels for the kdb results panel. Density-specific cell width settings are used first.

kdb-sqltools.results.rowHeight.description: Legacy fallback row height in pixels for the kdb results panel. Density-specific row height settings are used first.

kdb-sqltools.results.fontSize.description: Legacy fallback font size in pixels for the kdb results panel. Density-specific font size settings are used first. Use 0 for the VS Code default.

enumDescriptions: Use tighter row height and padding.
Use standard row height and padding.
Use roomier row height and padding.
kdb-sqltools.results.density.description: Visual density preset for the kdb results panel. Switching density loads that density's saved cell width, row height, and font size; editing those sizes saves the current density preset.

kdb-sqltools.results.compact.cellWidth.description: Compact density cell width in pixels for the kdb results panel. Editing Cell width in the panel while Compact is selected saves this preset.

kdb-sqltools.results.compact.rowHeight.description: Compact density row height in pixels for the kdb results panel. Editing Row height in the panel while Compact is selected saves this preset.

kdb-sqltools.results.compact.fontSize.description: Compact density font size in pixels for the kdb results panel. Editing Font size in the panel while Compact is selected saves this preset. Use 0 for the VS Code default.

kdb-sqltools.results.standard.cellWidth.description: Standard density cell width in pixels for the kdb results panel. Editing Cell width in the panel while Standard is selected saves this preset.

kdb-sqltools.results.standard.rowHeight.description: Standard density row height in pixels for the kdb results panel. Editing Row height in the panel while Standard is selected saves this preset.

kdb-sqltools.results.standard.fontSize.description: Standard density font size in pixels for the kdb results panel. Editing Font size in the panel while Standard is selected saves this preset. Use 0 for the VS Code default.

kdb-sqltools.results.comfortable.cellWid.description: Comfortable density cell width in pixels for the kdb results panel. Editing Cell width in the panel while Comfortable is selected saves this preset.

kdb-sqltools.results.comfortable.rowHeig.description: Comfortable density row height in pixels for the kdb results panel. Editing Row height in the panel while Comfortable is selected saves this preset.

kdb-sqltools.results.comfortable.fontSiz.description: Comfortable density font size in pixels for the kdb results panel. Editing Font size in the panel while Comfortable is selected saves this preset. Use 0 for the VS Code default.

kdb-sqltools.results.showRowIndex.description: Show the left row-number column in the kdb results panel.

kdb-sqltools.results.includeHeaders.description: Include column headers by default when copying or exporting from the kdb results panel.

kdb-sqltools.results.includeRowIndex.description: Include 1-based row numbers by default when copying or exporting from the kdb results panel.

kdb-sqltools.results.hideLargeResultWarn.description: Hide large-result guardrail messages in the kdb results panel.

kdb-sqltools.results.hideLargeSortWarnin.description: Skip large-result sort confirmation warnings in the kdb results panel.

enumDescriptions: Show elapsed time as milliseconds, seconds, or minutes depending on duration.
kdb-sqltools.results.elapsedTimeDisplay.description: Elapsed time display format in the kdb results panel.
